# Trader Locations

**Disclaimer:** Documentation generated by an LLM.

[← back to CONFIG](CONFIG.md)

`config/trader_locations.json` binds traders to extracts. Reaching the named extract on the named raid gives that trader's shop access.

Source: [TraderLocation.cs](../common/Definitions/TraderLocation.cs).

## Shape

Array of entries:

| Field | Notes |
| --- | --- |
| `traderId` | EFT trader id (mongo id). See [reference](#trader-ids). |
| `raid` | [Raid name](CONFIG.md#raid-names). |
| `exfilIdentifier` | `identifier` from `exfils/<raid>.json`. Must exist in that raid. |

A trader can have multiple bindings (e.g. Fence on Streets + Lighthouse, Mechanic on FactoryDay + FactoryNight — Day/Night are separate raids).

Multiple traders may share one `exfilIdentifier`. All bound traders unlock when that exfil is taken, and they share a single virtual stash keyed by the exfil identifier.

## Example

```json
[
  { "traderId": "579dc571d53a0658a154fbec", "raid": "Streets",    "exfilIdentifier": "VGB_EXT_FENCE" },
  { "traderId": "579dc571d53a0658a154fbec", "raid": "Lighthouse", "exfilIdentifier": "VGB_EXT_FENCE_DL" },
  { "traderId": "5a7c2eca46aef81a7ca2145d", "raid": "FactoryDay", "exfilIdentifier": "VGB_EXT_MECHANIC" }
]
```

## Trader IDs

| Trader | ID |
| --- | --- |
| Prapor | `54cb50c76803fa8b248b4571` |
| Therapist | `54cb57776803fa99248b456e` |
| Fence | `579dc571d53a0658a154fbec` |
| Skier | `58330581ace78e27b8b10cee` |
| Peacekeeper | `5935c25fb3acc3127c3d8cd9` |
| Mechanic | `5a7c2eca46aef81a7ca2145d` |
| Ragman | `5ac3b934156ae10c4430e83c` |
| Jaeger | `5c0647fdd443bc2504c2d371` |

For custom traders, use the trader id from that mod.
